kinds.description: Read-only command that returns a typed result without authoritative mutation.
Command that requests lawful mutation through a registered service or Process path.
Command that validates contracts, repository state, inputs, or artifacts.
Command that configures, builds, packages, or otherwise produces build outputs.
Command that executes tests or proof gates and emits evidence.
Command that inspects, validates, or prepares package and pack surfaces.
Command that inspects state, contracts, or artifacts without mutating authority.
Command that produces a derived projection, view, or portable artifact.
Command that emits diagnostics, repro bundles, or troubleshooting evidence.
Command that participates in release, promotion, signing, or distribution proof.
Command intended for Workbench orchestration through registered command surfaces.
Command intended for AIDE/Codex orchestration and evidence collection.
